title: Treaty of Anaxes
content:

{{Quote|Before the war, we were ''all'' allies under the ''Treaty of Anaxes'' -- pledged to each other's defense in case of an attack by such as the Yuuzhan Vong.|[[Marasiah Fel]]|<ref name="Legacy 25">[[Legacy (2006) 25|''Legacy'' (2006) 25]]</ref>}}
The '''Treaty of Anaxes''' was invoked by the [[Council of Moffs/Legends|Moff Council]] to initiate the [[Sith–Imperial War]].<ref name="Legacy 0" /> Initially, the treaty was to have the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] and the [[Fel Empire]] defend each other in case of attacks such as by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].<ref name="Legacy 25" /> It was used in supporting the repair of [[Planet/Legends|planets]]' ecosystems through [[Yuuzhan Vong]] bio-technology.<ref name="Legacy 0" />
